business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

positives: 42 years in business with 28 years under current management
Formal written safety program in place
OSHA 300 logs maintained and regular job-site safety audits conducted
Formal return-to-work/modified duty program in place
Hold-harmless agreements obtained from all subcontractors
concerns: No written contracts with all subcontractors
Certificates of insurance not required from all subcontractors before work begins
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2024: 13 claims / $1,634,721.63 premium (Nationwide, no cancellation); 2023: 10 claims / $1,476,849.96 premium (Berkshire Hathaway Guard, no cancellation); 2022: 4 claims / $1,369,245.71 premium (Zurich, cancelled)

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Hours of operation Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 3:30 PM. 425 full-time and 45 part-time employees.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal written safety program; OSHA 300 logs maintained with regular job-site safety audits; formal return-to-work/modified duty program; hold-harmless agreements obtained from all subcontractors. However, no written contracts with all subcontractors and certificates of insurance not required from subcontractors before work begins.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Three largest projects completed in past 3 years: 1) $1.2M restaurant build-out, 2) $800K medical office renovation, 3) $650K church addition. Prior insurance: 2024 Nationwide 13 claims; 2023 Berkshire Hathaway Guard 10 claims; 2022 Zurich 4 claims (cancelled).
